field.label: Enable MCP Server
field.comment: Master kill-switch. When disabled, every POST /mcp request returns HTTP 503 before authentication runs. Existing tokens remain intact.

field.label: Allow Write Tools
field.comment: Global override. A token's Allow write tools flag is only honoured when this is Yes.

field.label: Allowed Origins
field.comment:
DNS-rebinding defense. One origin per line. Supports exact match or a trailing * wildcard anchored to a host-component boundary, so http://localhost* matches http://localhost:3000 and http://localhost/mcp but not http://localhost.attacker.com.

Blank lines and # comments are ignored. Requests without an Origin header (curl, Claude Desktop, ChatGPT Desktop) always pass this check — bearer auth is still required. The literal Origin: null is always rejected.

Defaults cover loopback plus the major AI chat surfaces (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, Grok, Perplexity). Remove any your operators don't use, or narrow by port once a specific inspector/host is chosen.

field.label: Retention (days)
field.comment: Rows older than this are purged by the magebit_mcp_audit_purge cron job. Set to 0 to disable automatic purging.
